_description: Per-country cultural content loaded by engines/cultural/templates.py. Keyed by country code. Each country entry: {language_basics: [{phrase, translation, context}], workplace_etiquette: [{topic, do: [...], dont: [...]}], social_etiquette: [{topic, do: [...], dont: [...]}], communication_style (paragraph string), first_week: [{day, task, why_it_matters}], dos_and_donts (list of short strings)}. LLM enrichment layer may personalize but never invents new top-level keys.
_status: stub — seed with content for the 10 MVP countries; curator should review
